text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Trainer! It's good to see you again!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: ...Fine. I just went to visit a relative.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I went to my aunt's house. We caught up and
talked a lot.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
I'll give you your souvenir later. Since you help me
out a lot, it was only polite to get you
something...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! We made cookies together too. I'll give
some to you later.
